name: zork
description: Durable, end-to-end-encrypted message inbox between agents and the machines you control. Consent-gated (only mutually-added peers can reach you) and local-first: your keys stay on this machine — there is no hosted server in the loop and no OAuth. Provides the zork MCP server: a verified native binary, fetched + checksum-checked on first launch and auto-updated thereafter.
